title: Lab 7: Bikewatching
description: Built an interactive Mapbox and D3 map of Boston-area Bluebikes traffic with bike lane layers, station markers sized by traffic, time filtering, tooltips, and traffic-flow color encoding.

title: Lab 4: JavaScript II Portfolio Update
description: Converted the portfolio project list from hardcoded HTML into reusable JavaScript templates powered by a JSON data file and GitHub API data.

title: Lab 3: Introduction to JavaScript
description: Added modular JavaScript to the site, including dynamic navigation, current-page highlighting, a theme picker, and contact form behavior.

title: Lab 2: Styling with CSS
description: Designed the portfolio layout with responsive grids, custom spacing, image styling, project cards, and light/dark color-scheme support.

title: Lab 1: Personal Website Structure
description: Built the first version of the personal portfolio with separate pages for the homepage, projects, contact information, and resume.

title: Air Toxics and Adult Cancer Prevalence
description: Analyzed public health and environmental data to explore possible relationships between air toxics exposure and adult cancer prevalence.

title: EEG Blink Classification
description: Built and evaluated a model for distinguishing single and double blinks from EEG signal data.

title: Data Story Prototype
description: Drafted a concept for turning raw datasets into a narrative visualization with a clear takeaway.

title: Interactive Dashboard
description: Created a responsive dashboard mockup for comparing trends across multiple categories and time periods.

title: Machine Learning Notes
description: Collected experiments, model summaries, and lessons learned while practicing applied machine learning.

title: Campus Data Explorer
description: Outlined a tool for browsing university-related data through filters, summaries, and simple visual explanations.

title: Python Automation Tool
description: Planned scripts for cleaning data, automating repetitive tasks, and speeding up analysis workflows.

title: Visualization Sketchbook
description: Collected chart ideas and rough visualization concepts for experimenting with comparison, emphasis, and storytelling.
